step_rationale: Early AMI diagnostic biomarker reflecting cardiomyocyte lipid injury.
mechanism: L-arachidoyl carnitine accumulates in myocardial necrosis, serving as an early ischemia and cardiomyocyte damage marker.

references.title: Early diagnostic biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction unveiled by metabolomics, Mendelian randomization, and machine learning.
